{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55076", "cvss": {"score": 7.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-287", "name": "Improper Authentication"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-704", "name": "Incorrect Type Conversion or Cast"}], "description": "### Summary

Coder's OIDC callback checked `email_verified` with a direct Go `bool` type assertion. When an IdP returned the claim as a non-boolean (for example the string `"false"`) or omitted it, the assertion failed open and the email was treated as verified. Combined with an unconditional email-based account fallback, this enabled account takeover.

### Impact

An attacker who registered a victim's email at a compatible IdP without verifying it could log in via OIDC and be matched to the victim's existing Coder account, receiving a session for that account. No prior authentication to Coder was required and the result was full account takeover.

### Patches

The fix coerces `email_verified` across bool, string and numeric types (fail-closed) and blocks the email fallback when the matched user already has a different linked IdP subject.

The fix was backported to all supported release lines:

| Release line | Patched version |
|---|---|
| 2.34 | [v2.34.2](https://github.com/coder/coder/releases/tag/v2.34.2) |
| 2.33 | [v2.33.8](https://github.com/coder/coder/releases/tag/v2.33.8) |
| 2.32 | [v2.32.7](https://github.com/coder/coder/releases/tag/v2.32.7) |
| 2.29 (ESR) | [v2.29.17](https://github.com/coder/coder/releases/tag/v2.29.17) |

### Workarounds

Ensure the IdP returns `email_verified` as a native JSON boolean. The email-fallback linking issue has no configuration workaround; upgrading is required.

### Resources

- Fix: #25712, #25713

### Credits

Coder would like to thank Anthropic's Security Team (ANT-2026-22444) for independently disclosing this issue!", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00479, "percentile": 0.37955}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-75vm-6w67-gwvp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-06T20:50:35Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-75vm-6w67-gwvp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-75vm-6w67-gwvp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55076"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-06T20:50:35Z", "references": ["https://github.com/coder/coder/security/advisories/GHSA-75vm-6w67-gwvp", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-75vm-6w67-gwvp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/coder/coder/security-advisories/GHSA-75vm-6w67-gwvp", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/coder/coder", "summary": "Coder's OIDC email_verified type coercion bypass enables account takeover via unverified email linking", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T20:50:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-75vm-6w67-gwvp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.34.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/coder/coder/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.34.0, < 2.34.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.33.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/coder/coder/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.33.0, < 2.33.8"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.32.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/coder/coder/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.30.0, < 2.32.7"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.29.17", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/coder/coder/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.29.17"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Coder's OIDC email_verified type coercion bypass enables account takeover via unverified email linking
